column_groups.business_columns: Sourced from contributor file via lookup/LLM mapping. Subject to DQ checks.
column_groups.audit_columns: System-generated always. Timestamps, version, job reference. Never from contributor.
column_groups.lineage_columns: System-generated. Traces which file, row, and mapping decisions produced this record.

_metadata.system_tables_note: System tables are global and engine-owned. See global_system_tables.json.

TRD_CUSTOMER.description: Normalised buyer/customer identity and address data.

Account_Number.description: Buyer account number in supplier AR system. Primary link key to TRD_INVOICE.

DUNS_Number.description: Nine-digit D-U-N-S number identifying the buyer entity.

Government_ID.description: National identifier: VAT, Tax ID, EIN. Varies by country.

Company_Name.description: Legal or trading name of the buyer company.

Postcode.description: Postal or ZIP code. Stored as string.

Record_Version.description: Version counter. Starts at 1. Increments on re-submission.

Effective_From_Date.description: Date from which this record version is valid.

Effective_To_Date.description: Date this version was superseded. NULL = current active version.

Insert_Timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when row was written to canonical table.

Inserted_By_Job.description: Job ID that created this row. Join to ingestion history.

Last_Modified_By_Job.description: Job ID of most recent modification.

Processing_System.description: Pipeline version that produced this record.

Source_Filename.description: Original contributor filename this record came from.

Source_Row_Index.description: Row number in source file. Row 1 = first data row after header.

Source_File_Format.description: Detected format: CSV / JSON / XML / XLSX / TXT / TSV.

Mapping_Reference_ID.description: FK to COLUMN_LINEAGE. Full column-level mapping audit. JOIN COLUMN_LINEAGE ON Mapping_Reference_ID.

TRD_INVOICE.description: Normalised invoice and accounts receivable transaction records.

Account_Number.description: Buyer account number. FK to TRD_CUSTOMER.Account_Number.

DOE.description: Date of Experience — reporting cut-off date for this submission batch.

Invoice_Number.description: Unique invoice reference assigned by the supplier.

Due_Date.description: Contractual payment due date. Used to calculate days past due.

Paid_Date.description: Date invoice was fully paid. Null for open or partial.

Paid_Amount.description: Amount paid. May be less than Invoice_Amount for partial payments.

Payment_Terms.description: Agreed payment terms e.g. Net 30, Net 60.

Currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code e.g. USD, GBP, EUR.

Insert_Timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when row was written.

Inserted_By_Job.description: Job ID that created this row.

Last_Modified_By_Job.description: Job ID of most recent modification.

Processing_System.description: Pipeline version that produced this record.
